narrative:
Germantown City has 4,039 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points.
